business_ideas.idea: Crypto hedge funds (fund of funds): institutional access to crypto markets via managed exposure
Social tokens for musicians and creators: fans invest in artist upside, aligned incentives
Music royalty NFTs: fractionalized ownership of song streams and earnings
Community membership via NFTs: digital identity and club access for aligned believers

predictions.text: Crypto market reaches $200 trillion in 10-15 years vs. current $2 trillion
Music and culture become investable asset classes through social tokens and NFTs
Institutions will adopt Ethereum and Web3 investments over pure Bitcoin holdings
